title: Pasaccardoa procumbens
taxonomy: Pasaccardoa procumbens is a species of flowering plant in the family Campanulaceae. It is native to Madagascar and is classified as a flowering plant. Pasaccardoa procumbens is a member of the Campanulaceae family, which is commonly known as the bellflower family. The Campanulaceae family is a large and diverse group of flowering plants that are found in many different parts of the world. The classification of Pasaccardoa procumbens reflects its unique characteristics and evolutionary history.
